name: Cream of Green Bean
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the garlic, onions, and potatoes in the chicken broth according to Vichyssoise directions.
2. Add the frozen green beans and cook for an additional 5 to 10 minutes.
3. Continue cooking with milk and heavy cream according to Vichyssoise directions, adding seasonings as desired.
4. Puree the mixture.
5. Serve hot. (Broccoli, cauliflower, asparagus, spinach, watercress, cucumber, or any other vegetable may be substituted for the green beans.)
